calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Deborah K. Barron, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sophie Lee Kidd, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Creative Loans, LLC, Charles Head or Eduardo Vanega.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. was entered on July 14, 2009.
Cross-complaint by Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. was dismissed with prejudice on July 14, 2009.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Executive Trustee Service, LLC was entered on July 16, 2009.
Default was entered against defendants Creative Loans, LLC and Charles Head on February 6, 2007.
Default was entered against defendant Eduardo Venega on January 10, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on July 16, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Sophie Lee Kidd, and against the Defaulted Defendants Creative Loans, LLC, Charles head and Eduardo Vanega as follows:

Damages/Principal - $340,113.34.
Exemplary Damages - $1,020,340.02.
Prejudgment Interest - $105,498.22.
Attorney's Fees - $661,543.20.
Costs - $45,926.40, for a total judgment in the amount of $2,173.421.18

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
